creator: bmc@WillsCreek.COM
text:
Enclosed `diff -uNr' rolls in suggested changes from 
	Keith Mitchell <kmitch@guru.org> and Scott Gasch <scott@acm.vt.edu>
	to permit colorizing of setuid and setgid programs as well as
	other-writable dirs and other-writable-sticky dirs.

	Tested locally on FreeBSD 2.2.2-RELEASE.
